description: §61.4/§61.9 — an `<endpoint>` with a DUPLICATE arm for the same variant (two `FleetStatus` arms) follows the §18.0.1 arm-validity rules: it fires E-TYPE-023, NOT a dedicated E-ENDPOINT-* code. `<endpoint>` reuses the existing arm-validity surface rather than minting a parallel code.
rationale: §61.9: a duplicate arm is the §18.0.1 arm-validity diagnostic (E-TYPE-023), NOT an E-ENDPOINT-* code — `<endpoint>` reuses that surface. So E-TYPE-023 fires and the whole E-ENDPOINT-* family stays silent.
